data.description:
Add the following event-hosting copy to BOTH the Campus page and the Events page (planner to find the right placement on each):

---
Our community hosts events nearly every day. See upcoming events on our Luma calendar 🎉

Anyone can host an event in our space, even non-members:

🆓 To host a free event, add it directly to our Luma calendar

💰 To host a paid event, email crystal@fractalnyc.com
---

Links:
- 'Luma calendar' should hyperlink to the Fractal NYC Luma calendar URL — reuse the URL already embedded on the Events page (FRAC-166 added the Luma embed; pull the URL from there).
- 'crystal@fractalnyc.com' should be a mailto: link.

Placement:
- Events page: natural fit near the top or above the embedded calendar — frames the calendar.
- Campus page: planner to find the right section — likely near the existing events / audiences cluster. Coordinate with FRAC-54 (AI Accelerator section), FRAC-55 (membership tiers), FRAC-56 (Crystal contact) to avoid overlapping copy or duplicating the crystal@fractalnyc.com mention.

Relationships:
- depends_on: FRAC-166 (Luma embed established the URL)
- related_to: FRAC-56 (also mentions Crystal email — dedupe/coordinate)
- related_to: the rest of the Campus cluster (FRAC-51, 53, 54, 55)

Acceptance: (a) copy renders on both Campus and Events; (b) 'Luma calendar' phrase is a working hyperlink (same URL both pages); (c) crystal@fractalnyc.com is a mailto link on both pages; (d) emojis render correctly; (e) mobile-first: legible at 375px on both pages; (f) no duplicated Crystal contact treatment on Campus (coordinate with FRAC-56).
data.title: Campus + Events pages: add event-hosting copy with Luma calendar link + Crystal contact

data.body: Reviewed PR #204 with fresh context. PASS. Verified: (a) CRYSTAL_MAILTO constant added once in Campus, used in 3 spots (hero badge, four-audiences CTA, paid-event inline mailto) — matches FRAC-56 + FRAC-57 dedup plan. (b) Hero badge with ✉️ emoji renders below 'Want a reduced rate?' aside inside hero container. (c) 'First time here? Drop by for free!' CTA placed between audiences list and Fractal U button in the max-w-3xl section. (d) Old MERLINS_EVENTS_MAILTO constant fully removed (no leftover refs in src/) — clean cleanup beyond plan's 'remove if lint complains' note. (e) Campus events section: 4-paragraph block with 🎉/🆓/💰 emojis replaces Merlin's aside, uses LUMA_EVENTS_URL (https://lu.ma/nyc-tech) and CRYSTAL_MAILTO. (f) EventsPage: local LUMA_EVENTS_URL + CRYSTAL_MAILTO constants declared; new max-w-3xl mx-auto block placed between heading and Luma iframe with text-left override on section-wide text-center. (g) FRAC-48 centered-container pattern preserved across all insertions. (h) Mailtos correctly formatted as mailto:crystal@fractalnyc.com. (i) pnpm typecheck clean. No duplicate Crystal treatment. Implementation matches plan precisely.
Rework cycle 1: relocated event-hosting copy on EventsPage per user request. PR #204 updated.

data.reason: Rework requested by user after task was marked done in prior cycle; relocated event-hosting copy per new direction

provenance.reason: Rework requested by user after task was marked done in prior cycle; relocated event-hosting copy per new direction
